name: Label
visual_summary: A simple label component. A developer would use it to display text. The label is plain, not interactive.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Label
Description: A simple label component. A developer would use it to display text. The label is plain, not interactive.
Style: minimal, dark/light-mode
Interactions: plain
Tags: label, text, element

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):

  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof LabelPrimitive.Root>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <LabelPrimitive.Root
    ref={ref}
    className={cn(
      "text-sm font-medium text-black dark:text-white leading-none peer-disabled:cursor-not-allowed peer-disabled:opacity-70",
